creator: devel@stasyan.com
text:
Bulding cad/salome-kernel fails at start with error:

autoconf-2.62: no input file

Fix: Patch in attachement make "canonical" use of bsd.autotools.mk insted of calling script build_configure.sh.

Patch attached with submission follows:
How-To-Repeat: cd /usr/ports/cad/salome && make install
